resources.string: Shows unpaid invoices and total rooms
Please fill in all required information
Do not have an account? Sign up now
Already have an account? Log in
Google Sign-In is not fully configured in Firebase
Google accounts cannot change password in this app. Please change it from your Google account.
Your account role has changed. Please sign in again to enter the OWNER UI.
Enter a new password to continue
Are you sure you want to log out?
Are you sure you want to delete %1$s?
Cannot delete this house because it still contains rooms. Please remove or move all rooms first.
Room is rented. Edit and delete are disabled.
Hello, I am contacting you about Room %1$s
Cannot delete: room currently has tenant(s)
Room has tenants, status was auto-switched to Rented
Room number already exists in selected house
Please enter a valid max occupants value (> 0)
This action has moved to the Contract screen. Please manage it there.
Please open Room details to create a contract/tenant.
No rental history yet\n\nHistory will be saved when a contract ends
Contract ended and moved to history
Invoice for this period already exists
Bill total: %1$s | Collected: %2$s | Remaining: %3$s | Showing: %4$d/%5$d bills
Bill total: 0 VND | Collected: 0 VND | Remaining: 0 VND | Showing: 0/0 bills
Receiver bank information is not configured
Confirm full transfer received based on proof.
Confirm full cash collection for remaining balance.
Tenant has not submitted transfer proof
Transferred amount is not enough. Add note and wait for more payment.
Room %1$s has been billed for period %2$s
New water reading must be >= old reading
Example: Tenant paid part of the amount, remaining due on ...
Tap to view restore options (coming soon)
Enter basic details and a cover photo for the room
Landscape photos look better in the preview
The room number will be checked for duplicates within the same house before saving.
Thank you for paying on time!
View reported fees for this room
Other fees: Trash %1$s | Wifi %2$s | Parking %3$s | Other %4$s
Other fees: Trash 0 VND | Wifi 0 VND | Parking 0 VND | Other 0 VND
Step 1: Enter final meter readings and report billing.
Step 2: Billing reported, wait for payment or collect payment.
Done: invoice has been fully paid.
Quick info for temporary residence procedures
No tenant profiles found for the active contract
Account owner: Quang\nTien Phong Bank\nAccount no: 0987654321
No fees configured for this house
Quickly chat with tenants in each room
Quickly send issue reports to the landlord and track progress
You do not have permission to manage reports
Please enter the room group code shared by the owner to continue.
Your session has expired. Please sign in again.
%1$d days left to fee closing deadline
Chat by room, whole house, or private threads.
Choose a room to start a room thread.
Choose a user for private chat
You are not allowed to send in this conversation
Realtime notifications for messages and reminders
